subject: feat(icons): increase DPI to 400 and add dedicated maskable icon
body:
Sharp density 150→400 for crisper edge anti-aliasing on smaller icons.
New 1024x1024 maskable icon with full-bleed background and B glyph
scaled to 80% safe zone. Manifest updated: 192/512 purpose "any",
1024 purpose "maskable". Added 48px favicon PNG.

Tags: icons, pwa, glow-props-sync
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: glow-props-sync
Semver: minor
